maxdepth.description: Descend at most N levels of directories below the starting-points

name.description: Match filename against shell glob pattern

type.description: Match by file type (f=file, d=directory, l=symlink, etc.)

size.description: Match by file size with optional suffix (c=bytes, k=KiB, M=MiB, G=GiB)

user.description: Match files owned by specified user name or UID

perm.description: Match files with specified permission bits

mtime.description: Match by modification time in days (+N=more than, -N=less than, N=exactly)

newer.description: Match files modified more recently than the given reference file

exec.description: Execute a command on each matched file; terminated by ';' or '+' for batch

print0.description: Print full filename followed by NUL character instead of newline

regextype.description: Set regex dialect for -regex (posix-basic, posix-extended, emacs, etc.)
